code:
%%{Education_ClassroomService}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant RegistrationForm as Registration Form
    participant FortifyController as Fortify Controller
    participant UserRepository as User Repository
    participant EmailVerification as Email Verification
    participant Database as Database

    User->>RegistrationForm: Fill registration form
    RegistrationForm->>FortifyController: Submit registration data
    FortifyController->>FortifyController: Validate input
    FortifyController->>UserRepository: Create user
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate snowflake ID
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate slug
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Hash password
    UserRepository->>Database: Save user
    Database-->>UserRepository: Confirm save
    UserRepository-->>FortifyController: Return user
    FortifyController->>EmailVerification: Send verification email
    EmailVerification-->>User: Email with verification link
    FortifyController-->>RegistrationForm: Registration successful
    RegistrationForm-->>User: Show success message
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个教育平台的用户注册流程时序图。用户从填写注册表单开始，经过FortifyController处理，最后完成邮箱验证。核心是要体现UserRepository内部生成ID、slug和密码哈希的细节。
明白。我注意到UserRepository有三个内部自调用：生成snowflake ID、生成slug、哈希密码。这三个是顺序执行还是并行的？另外Database确认保存后，UserRepository是直接把user返回给FortifyController吗？
三个自调用是顺序的，先ID后slug最后哈希。流程是Database确认保存后，UserRepository返回user给FortifyController，然后FortifyController触发邮件验证服务。
好的，我先画出主干：User填写RegistrationForm，提交到FortifyController，FortifyController先做输入校验，然后调用UserRepository创建用户。UserRepository内部完成三个自调用后持久化到Database。
校验环节需要明确画出来，是FortifyController的自调用。另外成功后的回执路径要清晰：Database确认保存后逐层返回，FortifyController同时发起邮件验证，最后RegistrationForm给用户显示成功消息。
邮件验证这块，EmailVerification服务是异步发送吧？画虚线返回给User表示邮件已发出？还有FortifyController给RegistrationForm的成功回执和给EmailVerification的调用，这两个有先后顺序吗？
对，EmailVerification用虚线异步发给User。顺序上FortifyController先调用EmailVerification发邮件，然后才把成功结果返回给RegistrationForm。这样RegistrationForm收到成功响应时，邮件已经在路上了。
完成。整个流程：User填表→提交→FortifyController校验→UserRepository生成ID/slug/哈希→Database保存确认→逐层返回user→FortifyController并行发邮件和返回成功→RegistrationForm通知用户。所有虚线返回和自调用都已标注。
